Yes, Aditya Vision is steadfast in its commitment to ensuring ethical standards and preventing conflicts of interest within its Board, with several measures. BoDs must disclose their interests upon joining and promptly update any changes throughout the fiscal year, ensuring transparency and accountability in governance. Independent Directors are required to uphold their ability to perform their duties objectively and independently, as required by Regulation 25(8) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations 2015, and must make independent declarations as per Section 149(7) of the Companies Act, 2013, and Regulation 16(1)(b) of the SEBI Regulations 2015. These declarations emphasize their autonomy and impartiality.
